title: Automation that updates another status in another board
excerpt: Using Connect Boards, you can use Automation Recipe 280 to change a status in a board, and use that status change to trigger another status change in another board. HOWEVER, if the Connect boards column that you are usin…

posts.author: pdotc (Peter Carlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Using Connect Boards, you can use Automation Recipe 280 to change a status in a board, and use that status change to trigger another status change in another board. HOWEVER, if the Connect boards column that you are using has more than one linked board, the 280 recip does not work. Has anyone else been able to bypass this or worked around it?
